main.summary: Detailed invocation result containing return value, post-invocation argument state, selected method, and by-ref parameter indices.

constructor.name: Constructor
constructor.param: Post-invocation argument array with updated ref/out values.
Parameter indices that are ref or out. Empty when no by-ref parameters exist.

property.name: ReturnValue
property.summary: Method return value. Null for void methods and normalized async void results.

property.name: Arguments
property.summary: Post-invocation argument array. Updated values at by-ref positions reflect callee writes.

property.name: Method
property.summary: The method that was selected and invoked.

property.name: ByRefIndices
property.summary: Parameter indices that are ref or out. Empty when no by-ref parameters exist.

property.name: HasByRefArguments
property.summary: True when the invoked method has at least one ref or out parameter; otherwise false.
